<!-- Hand-curated. The auto-generator emitted Node.js / generic-doc-site advice that doesn't apply here — every file under this directory is generated by tfplugindocs from schema. -->

# AGENTS.md — docs

## Overview

**Do not edit files in this directory directly.** Every Markdown file under `docs/` is generated by [`tfplugindocs`](https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-docs) from:
- The provider's schema `MarkdownDescription` strings (in `internal/provider/provider.go` and `internal/resources/*.go`)
- HCL example files in `examples/resources/azurefoundry_<name>/resource.tf` and `examples/provider/provider.tf`

CI fails on any drift between schema + examples and `docs/` — this is the `Docs drift (tfplugindocs)` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.

## Files

| File | Source |
|------|--------|
| `docs/index.md` | `internal/provider/provider.go` schema (`MarkdownDescription`) + `examples/provider/provider.tf` |
| `docs/resources/agent.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_agent.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_agent/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/agent_v2.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_agent_v2.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_agent_v2/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/file.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_file.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_file/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/file_v2.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_file_v2.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_file_v2/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/vector_store.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_vector_store.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_vector_store/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/vector_store_v2.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_vector_store_v2.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_vector_store_v2/resource.tf` |
| `docs/resources/memory_store_v2.md` | `internal/resources/foundry_memory_store_v2.go` schema + `examples/resources/azurefoundry_memory_store_v2/resource.tf` |

## How to update docs

1. Edit the relevant `MarkdownDescription` on the schema attribute, OR change the `examples/resources/.../resource.tf` HCL.
2. Run: `tfplugindocs generate --provider-name azurefoundry`
3. Commit the generated `docs/` changes alongside the schema/example change. CI will reject the PR if you commit one without the other.

## Quick checks

```bash
# What would change if I regenerated right now?
tfplugindocs generate --provider-name azurefoundry && git diff -- docs/

# Verify regeneration is idempotent (run twice; second should be a no-op)
tfplugindocs generate --provider-name azurefoundry >/dev/null
shasum -a 256 docs/index.md docs/resources/*.md > /tmp/a
tfplugindocs generate --provider-name azurefoundry >/dev/null
shasum -a 256 docs/index.md docs/resources/*.md > /tmp/b
diff /tmp/a /tmp/b
```

## When stuck
- tfplugindocs README: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-docs
- Provider docs publishing: https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/registry/providers/docs
- Look at how an existing resource's schema sets up `MarkdownDescription` + matching `examples/resources/.../resource.tf` — copy that pattern.
